Author: The Bus AI Connector
Name: The Bus AI Bridge
Description: Drive The Bus (TML-Studios) from your Stream Deck: autopilot engage/release, feature toggles, any bus event, live speed display. Needs the game's telemetry interface enabled.

Actions.Name: Autopilot (engage/release)
Actions.Tooltip: Press to engage the autopilot (speed, stops, doors - no steering), press again to release control back to you.

Actions.Name: Autopilot Feature
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle one autopilot feature: service stops, auto doors, auto lights, driver yield...

Actions.Name: Bus Button
Actions.Tooltip: Tap (or hold) any bus event: doors, indicators, warning lights, gear, kneeling, horn, ticketing...

Actions.Name: Speed Display
Actions.Tooltip: Live speed with the limit or autopilot target. Press to toggle speed control.

Actions.Name: Speed Offset (dial)
Actions.Tooltip: Rotate to drive above/below the posted limit (+/- 1 km/h per tick, persisted), press or touch to reset to the limit. For GALLEON 100 SD / Stream Deck + dials.

Actions.Name: Speed Limiter (dial)
Actions.Tooltip: Rotate to set the hard limiter's cap (20-90 km/h, persisted), press or touch to switch the limiter on/off.

Actions.Name: Wiper (dial)
Actions.Tooltip: Rotate for faster/slower wipers (Off, Interval, On, Fast), press to switch them off. The LCD shows the live wiper state.

Actions.Name: A/C (dial)
Actions.Tooltip: Rotate to set the air-condition temperature, press for the next fan intensity. The LCD shows the set temperature and fan level.

Actions.Name: Drive Dial A/B
Actions.Tooltip: Two functions on one dial: A = speed-limit offset, B = limiter cap. LONG-press the dial to switch between A and B; short press resets the offset (A) or toggles the limiter (B).

TriggerDescription.Rotate: A: limit offset / B: limiter cap
TriggerDescription.Push: Short: reset / limiter on-off · LONG: switch A-B
TriggerDescription.Touch: A: reset offset / B: limiter on-off
